name: GT BIOPHARMA INC
summary: GT BIOPHARMA INC is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative therapies for cancer treatment. Their lead product candidate is GTB-3550, a TriKE™ (Tri-specific Killer Engager) for the treatment of acute myeloid leukemia (AML). The company is headquartered in Irvine, California.
